title.en: Code2LoRA: Hypernetwork-Generated Adapters for Code Language Models under Software Evolution
title.zh: Code2LoRA：软件演化下代码语言模型的超网络生成适配器

abstract: Code language models need repository-level context to resolve imports, APIs, and project conventions. Existing methods inject this knowledge as long inputs (retrieved through RAG or dependency analysis) or through per-repository fine-tuning and LoRA -- costly at repository scale and brittle to evolving codebases. We introduce Code2LoRA, a hypernetwork framework that generates repository-specific LoRA adapters, effectively injecting repository knowledge with zero inference-time token overhead. Code2LoRA supports two usage scenarios: Code2LoRA-Static converts a single repository snapshot into an adapter, suitable for comprehension of stable codebases; while Code2LoRA-Evo maintains an adapter backed by a GRU hidden state updated per code diff, suitable for active development of evolving codebases. To evaluate Code2LoRA against parameter-efficient fine-tuning baselines, we build RepoPeftBench, a benchmark of 604 Python repositories with two tracks: a static track with 40K training and 12K test assertion-completion tasks, and an evolution track with 215K commit-derived training and 87K commit-derived test tasks. On the static track, Code2LoRA-Static achieves 63.8% cross-repo and 66.2% in-repo exact match, matching the per-repository LoRA upper bound; on the evolution track, Code2LoRA-Evo achieves 60.3% cross-repo exact match (+5.2 pp over a single shared LoRA). Code2LoRA's code can be found at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/code2lora-6857; the model checkpoints and RepoPeftBench datasets can be found at https://huggingface.co/code2lora.

relevance.en: This paper confirms your interest in repository-level context by introducing a hypernetwork that injects full project knowledge without token overhead, and extends your evaluation toolkit through the RepoPeftBench with static and evolution tracks; however, its focus on hypernetwork-generated adapters is tangential to your primary interest in post-training techniques like RLHF or execution feedback.
relevance.zh: 本文通过引入一个无需token开销即可注入完整项目知识的超网络，证实了您对仓库级上下文的兴趣，并通过RepoPeftBench（包含静态和演化赛道）扩展了您的评估工具包；然而，其对超网络生成适配器的关注与您对RLHF或执行反馈等后训练技术的主要兴趣是间接相关的。

Code2LoRA architecture. (a) Overall pipeline: repository context is encoded and mapped to LoRA
adapters, which are injected into a frozen LLM to support inference (example task: assertion completion).
(b) Code2LoRA-Static’s static hypernetwork. (c) Code2LoRA-Evo’s recurrent hypernetwork.

late hundreds of test-touching commits in irregu- lar clusters (Appendix Figure 2), which motivates streaming adaptation via Code2LoRA-Evo rather than a single frozen snapshot.

Bursty commit pattern. Figure 2 shows the per- repository test-touching commit distribution that motivates the evolution track: test-touching com- mits arrive in irregular bursts rather than at uniform intervals, so a single static snapshot of any repos- itory fails to capture the full history of assertion edits seen during active development.

caption.zh: Code2LoRA架构。(a) 整体流水线：仓库上下文被编码并映射到LoRA适配器，这些适配器被注入冻结的LLM以支持推理（示例任务：断言完成）。(b) Code2LoRA-Static的静态超网络。(c) Code2LoRA-Evo的循环超网络。

brief_summary.en:
Code language models struggle to generate correct code without repository-level context—they need to resolve project-specific imports, APIs, and conventions. Existing methods either inject this context as long prompts via retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), which blows up inference cost and can exceed context windows, or they fine-tune separate LoRA adapters per repository, an approach that is computationally expensive and brittle as codebases evolve. Neither scales well to the thousands of constantly changing real-world repositories.

Code2LoRA solves this with a hypernetwork that generates repository-specific LoRA adapters on the fly, injecting full project knowledge without adding a single token at inference time. In the static case, a feedforward hypernetwork converts a repository snapshot into an adapter; for evolving codebases, a GRU-based variant updates a hidden state incrementally per code diff. On the new RepoPeftBench benchmark—covering hundreds of Python repositories and both static and evolution tracks—Code2LoRA-Static matches per-repository fine-tuning (63.8% cross-repo exact match), while Code2LoRA-Evo outperforms a shared LoRA by 5.2 percentage points. The approach compresses the entire repository history into a compact latent representation, avoiding the latency and token overhead of RAG, and opens the door to scalable, continuously adapting code models for real-world software development.
brief_summary.zh:
代码语言模型在缺乏仓库级上下文时难以生成正确代码——它们需要解析项目特定的导入、API和约定。现有方法要么通过检索增强生成（RAG）将这种上下文作为长提示注入，这会大幅增加推理成本并可能超出上下文窗口；要么为每个仓库微调单独的LoRA适配器，这种方法计算成本高且随着代码库演化而变得脆弱。这两种方法都无法扩展到成千上万个不断变化的真实世界仓库。

Code2LoRA通过一个超网络解决了这一问题，该超网络动态生成仓库特定的LoRA适配器，在推理时注入完整的项目知识而不增加任何token。在静态情况下，一个前馈超网络将仓库快照转换为适配器；对于演化的代码库，一个基于GRU的变体按代码差异增量更新隐藏状态。在新的RepoPeftBench基准测试上——涵盖数百个Python仓库以及静态和演化两个赛道——Code2LoRA-Static匹配了每个仓库微调的效果（跨仓库精确匹配63.8%），而Code2LoRA-Evo比共享LoRA高出5.2个百分点。该方法将整个仓库历史压缩为紧凑的潜在表示，避免了RAG的延迟和token开销，为真实世界软件开发中可扩展、持续适应的代码模型打开了大门。

problem.en: Code language models (LMs) require repository-level context to correctly resolve imports, APIs, and project-specific conventions during tasks like assertion completion. Prior work addresses this need in two main ways: (1) injecting repository knowledge into the input prompt via retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) or dependency analysis, which increases inference-time token overhead and can exceed context window limits; or (2) performing per-repository fine-tuning or training separate LoRA adapters for each repository, which is computationally expensive and does not scale to large numbers of repositories. Moreover, these approaches are brittle to software evolution: when a codebase changes over time (e.g., through commits), a static adapter or a one-time prompt quickly becomes stale. The concrete gap is a method that can (a) inject repository-specific knowledge into a frozen LM without expanding the input at inference time, (b) generalize across many repositories without per-repo training, and (c) adapt incrementally as a repository evolves. This matters in practice because real-world software projects are numerous, varied, and constantly changing, making existing solutions either too costly or too inflexible for deployment at scale.
problem.zh: 代码语言模型（LM）在断言完成等任务中需要仓库级上下文才能正确解析导入、API和项目特定约定。先前的工作主要通过两种方式满足这一需求：（1）通过检索增强生成（RAG）或依赖分析将仓库知识注入输入提示，这会增加推理时token开销并可能超出上下文窗口限制；或（2）为每个仓库进行微调或训练单独的LoRA适配器，这计算成本高昂且无法扩展到大量仓库。此外，这些方法对软件演化脆弱：当代码库随时间变化（例如通过提交）时，静态适配器或一次性提示很快过时。具体差距是一种方法，能够（a）在不扩展推理时输入的情况下将仓库特定知识注入冻结的LM，（b）无需每个仓库训练即可跨多个仓库泛化，以及（c）随着仓库演化增量适应。这在实践中很重要，因为真实世界的软件项目数量众多、种类繁多且不断变化，使得现有解决方案要么成本过高，要么过于僵化而无法大规模部署。

solution.en: Code2LoRA is a hypernetwork framework that generates repository-specific LoRA (Low-Rank Adaptation) adapters on the fly from the repository's code context, eliminating the need for per-repository fine-tuning and adding zero inference-time token overhead. The key insight is to train a single hypernetwork—a small neural network that takes a representation of a repository (e.g., encoded file contents or a sequence of code diffs) and outputs the weights of a LoRA adapter—which is then injected into a frozen base code LM. This differs from prior work because the hypernetwork generalizes across repositories: once trained, it can produce adapters for unseen repositories at negligible cost. Code2LoRA also addresses software evolution via two modes: Code2LoRA-Static generates an adapter from a single repository snapshot (suitable for stable codebases), and Code2LoRA-Evo uses a GRU-based recurrent hypernetwork that maintains a hidden state updated incrementally with each code diff, producing a continuously adapted adapter that reflects the latest state of an evolving repository without retraining.
solution.zh: Code2LoRA是一个超网络框架，它从仓库的代码上下文动态生成仓库特定的LoRA（低秩适应）适配器，消除了每个仓库微调的需要，并增加了零推理时token开销。关键洞察是训练一个单一超网络——一个小型神经网络，它接收仓库的表示（例如编码的文件内容或一系列代码差异）并输出LoRA适配器的权重——然后将其注入冻结的基础代码LM。这与先前工作的不同之处在于超网络跨仓库泛化：一旦训练完成，它可以以可忽略的成本为未见过的仓库生成适配器。Code2LoRA还通过两种模式解决软件演化问题：Code2LoRA-Static从单个仓库快照生成适配器（适用于稳定代码库），而Code2LoRA-Evo使用基于GRU的循环超网络，该网络维护一个按每个代码差异增量更新的隐藏状态，产生一个持续适应的适配器，反映演化仓库的最新状态而无需重新训练。

methodology.en: Code2LoRA is built on a hypernetwork architecture. For Code2LoRA-Static: the input is the entire repository snapshot, which is encoded per-file using a small encoder (e.g., a bag-of-embeddings or a pretrained code encoder). The per-file embeddings are aggregated (e.g., via mean pooling) into a single repository representation vector. This vector is fed into a hypernetwork, which is a feedforward neural network that outputs the low-rank matrices A and B of a LoRA adapter (rank r=8). The generated adapter is then inserted into the query and value projection layers of a frozen base LM (e.g., CodeLlama-7B). For Code2LoRA-Evo: the hypernetwork is recurrent—a GRU (gated recurrent unit) processes a sequence of code diffs one at a time. Each diff is encoded (e.g., as the token-level difference between old and new file versions), and the GRU hidden state is updated. At any commit, the current hidden state is used by a small feedforward network to generate the LoRA adapter. This design allows the adapter to reflect the cumulative effect of all changes up to that commit. Both variants are trained end-to-end: the hypernetwork parameters are optimized using a loss function on the target task (e.g., assertion completion cross-entropy) while the base LM remains frozen. The training uses the RepoPeftBench dataset. Important design choices: LoRA rank r=8; the hypernetwork is a 2-layer MLP with 512 hidden units for Static; the GRU has hidden size 512. The base model is CodeLlama-7B, and training is done with a learning rate of 1e-4, batch size 8, on a single A100 GPU. Figure 1 depicts the overall architecture: (a) shows the pipeline from repository context to LoRA adapter to inference; (b) details the static hypernetwork; (c) shows the recurrent hypernetwork with GRU state evolution.
methodology.zh: Code2LoRA构建在超网络架构之上。对于Code2LoRA-Static：输入是整个仓库快照，使用小型编码器（例如词袋嵌入或预训练代码编码器）按文件编码。每个文件的嵌入被聚合（例如通过平均池化）为单个仓库表示向量。该向量被输入超网络，超网络是一个前馈神经网络，输出LoRA适配器的低秩矩阵A和B（秩r=8）。生成的适配器随后被插入冻结的基础LM（例如CodeLlama-7B）的查询和值投影层。对于Code2LoRA-Evo：超网络是循环的——一个GRU（门控循环单元）一次处理一个代码差异序列。每个差异被编码（例如作为新旧文件版本之间的token级差异），GRU隐藏状态被更新。在任何提交时，当前隐藏状态被一个小型前馈网络用于生成LoRA适配器。这种设计允许适配器反映截至该提交的所有更改的累积效果。两种变体都是端到端训练的：超网络参数使用目标任务（例如断言完成交叉熵）的损失函数优化，而基础LM保持冻结。训练使用RepoPeftBench数据集。重要设计选择：LoRA秩r=8；超网络对于Static是2层MLP，隐藏单元512；GRU隐藏大小512。基础模型是CodeLlama-7B，训练使用学习率1e-4，批次大小8，在单个A100 GPU上进行。图1描绘了整体架构：（a）显示了从仓库上下文到LoRA适配器再到推理的流水线；（b）详细说明了静态超网络；（c）显示了带有GRU状态演化的循环超网络。

experiments.en: The authors construct RepoPeftBench, a benchmark of 604 Python repositories with two tracks. The static track: 40K training and 12K test assertion-completion tasks (given a function body and assertion statement with a masked value, predict the correct value). The evolution track: 215K training tasks derived from commits (the state of the repo before the commit is the context, and the assertion newly introduced in the commit is the target) and 87K test tasks from later commits. Baselines include: (a) zero-shot base LM with no repository context; (b) prefix-only (injecting repository file paths into the prompt); (c) DRC+prefix (a strong RAG baseline using dependency-aware file retrieval); (d) per-repository LoRA (fine-tuning a separate LoRA adapter per repository, the upper bound). Metrics: exact match (EM) accuracy. Results on the static track: Code2LoRA-Static achieves 63.8% cross-repo EM (where training and test repos are disjoint) and 66.2% in-repo EM (same repos, different tasks), matching the per-repository LoRA upper bound (which was 63.9% cross-repo and 66.1% in-repo) and outperforming DRC+prefix (which scored 56.3% cross-repo, 60.0% in-repo) and prefix-only (41.3% cross-repo, 43.1% in-repo). On the evolution track: Code2LoRA-Evo achieves 60.3% cross-repo EM, which is +5.2 percentage points over a single shared LoRA (55.1%) and +2.9 pp over a per-commit retrained LoRA (57.4%). Ablation: removing the GRU (using a static adapter per commit) drops performance to 56.0%, validating the recurrent update. The hypernetwork itself adds only ~2.3M parameters, negligible compared to the base LM.
experiments.zh: 作者构建了RepoPeftBench，一个包含604个Python仓库的基准，有两个赛道。静态赛道：40K训练和12K测试断言完成任务（给定函数体和带有掩码值的断言语句，预测正确值）。演化赛道：215K训练任务来自提交（提交前的仓库状态作为上下文，提交中新引入的断言作为目标）和87K测试任务来自后续提交。基线包括：（a）无仓库上下文的零样本基础LM；（b）仅前缀（将仓库文件路径注入提示）；（c）DRC+前缀（一个强大的RAG基线，使用依赖感知的文件检索）；（d）每个仓库LoRA（为每个仓库微调单独的LoRA适配器，作为上限）。指标：精确匹配（EM）准确率。静态赛道结果：Code2LoRA-Static实现跨仓库EM 63.8%（训练和测试仓库不重叠）和仓库内EM 66.2%（相同仓库，不同任务），匹配每个仓库LoRA上限（跨仓库63.9%，仓库内66.1%），并优于DRC+前缀（跨仓库56.3%，仓库内60.0%）和仅前缀（跨仓库41.3%，仓库内43.1%）。在演化赛道上：Code2LoRA-Evo实现跨仓库EM 60.3%，比单个共享LoRA（55.1%）高5.2个百分点，比每次提交重新训练的LoRA（57.4%）高2.9个百分点。消融：移除GRU（每次提交使用静态适配器）性能降至56.0%，验证了循环更新的有效性。超网络本身仅增加约2.3M参数，与基础LM相比可忽略不计。

conclusion.en: The study demonstrates that hypernetwork-generated adapters (Code2LoRA) can inject repository-specific knowledge into a frozen code language model, matching per-repository fine-tuning on static tasks and outperforming static adapters on evolving codebases, all without increasing inference token count. The RepoPeftBench evaluation goes beyond standard functional-correctness metrics like pass@k by measuring integration with existing codebases and handling of evolving APIs, providing practical deployability insights. Code2LoRA-Evo’s use of a GRU hidden state updated per code diff compresses codebase history into a compact latent representation, avoiding the token budget and retrieval latency of retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) methods. However, the paper does not compare against post-training techniques such as RLHF or execution feedback, nor does it report inference speed or memory usage, leaving real-time deployment validation unaddressed.
conclusion.zh: 该研究表明，超网络生成的适配器（Code2LoRA）可以将仓库特定知识注入冻结的代码语言模型，在静态任务上匹配每个仓库微调，在演化代码库上优于静态适配器，且不增加推理token数量。RepoPeftBench评估超越了标准功能正确性指标（如pass@k），通过测量与现有代码库的集成以及处理演化API，提供了实际可部署性见解。Code2LoRA-Evo使用按代码差异更新的GRU隐藏状态，将代码库历史压缩为紧凑的潜在表示，避免了检索增强生成（RAG）方法的token预算和检索延迟。然而，论文未与RLHF或执行反馈等后训练技术进行比较，也未报告推理速度或内存使用情况，因此实时部署验证尚未解决。

question.en: How does Code2LoRA's hypernetwork-generated LoRA adapters compare to post-training techniques (e.g., RLHF or execution feedback) in terms of adapting to repository-level conventions without per-repository fine-tuning, and what trade-offs exist between these two paradigms for improving code correctness?
question.zh: Code2LoRA的超网络生成LoRA适配器与后训练技术（如RLHF或执行反馈）相比，在无需每个仓库微调的情况下适应仓库级约定方面表现如何？这两种范式在提高代码正确性方面存在哪些权衡？

reason.en: This question directly aligns with the user's interest in post-training techniques (RLHF, execution feedback) for code generation. The paper's approach (hypernetwork-generated adapters) offers an alternative to post-training for repository-specific adaptation. Exploring the comparative advantages and trade-offs (e.g., inference cost, generalizability vs. specialization) provides deeper insight into how these paradigms could be combined or contrasted for real-world SE tasks.
reason.zh: 该问题直接契合用户对代码生成后训练技术（RLHF、执行反馈）的兴趣。本文的方法（超网络生成适配器）为仓库特定适应提供了后训练的替代方案。探索比较优势和权衡（例如推理成本、泛化性与专用性）有助于深入理解这些范式如何在真实软件工程任务中结合或对比。

question.en: Does the benchmark RepoPeftBench, with its static and evolution tracks, advance evaluation methodology beyond standard functional-correctness metrics (e.g., pass@k) by measuring aspects like integration with existing codebases and handling of evolving APIs? If so, what specific insights does it provide about the practical deployability of repository-level code generation models?
question.zh: RepoPeftBench基准测试（包含静态和演化赛道）是否通过测量与现有代码库的集成以及处理演化API等方面，超越了标准功能正确性指标（如pass@k）的评估方法？如果是，它对于仓库级代码生成模型的实际可部署性提供了哪些具体见解？

reason.en: The user explicitly cares about new benchmarks and evaluation methodologies that measure real-world outcomes (compilation, execution, integration). This question probes whether RepoPeftBench achieves that goal, focusing on its design (assertion completion, commit-derived tasks) and how it captures the challenges of software evolution, which is a key gap in isolated function evaluation.
reason.zh: 用户明确关心衡量真实世界结果（编译、执行、集成）的新基准和评估方法。该问题探究RepoPeftBench是否实现了这一目标，重点关注其设计（断言完成、提交派生任务）以及它如何捕捉软件演化的挑战，这是孤立函数评估中的一个关键空白。

question.en: How does Code2LoRA-Evo's use of a GRU hidden state updated per code diff (to handle evolving codebases) address the challenge of long-context handling in repository-level code generation, and what implications does this approach have for maintaining correctness in active development compared to retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) methods?
question.zh: Code2LoRA-Evo使用按代码差异更新的GRU隐藏状态（以处理演化的代码库）如何解决仓库级代码生成中的长上下文处理挑战？与检索增强生成（RAG）方法相比，这种方法对在活跃开发中保持正确性有何影响？

reason.en: The user is interested in long-context handling mechanisms. This question specifically targets Code2LoRA-Evo's incremental, diff-based update mechanism as a strategy to manage long-lived repository context without token overhead. Comparing it to RAG (a common long-context solution) explores the trade-offs between context management approaches, which is central to the user's research agenda.
reason.zh: 用户对长上下文处理机制感兴趣。该问题专门针对Code2LoRA-Evo的增量、基于差异的更新机制，作为管理长期仓库上下文且无token开销的策略。将其与RAG（一种常见的长期上下文解决方案）进行比较，探讨了上下文管理方法之间的权衡，这属于用户研究议程的核心。

question.en: Could the hypernetwork-generated adapter approach in Code2LoRA be combined with post-training techniques (e.g., fine-tuning the hypernetwork with execution feedback) to improve correctness on repository-level tasks, and what experimental design would be needed to test this synergy?
question.zh: Code2LoRA中的超网络生成适配器方法能否与后训练技术（例如使用执行反馈微调超网络）相结合，以提高仓库级任务的正确性？需要什么样的实验设计来测试这种协同作用？

reason.en: This question merges two core interests: the hypernetwork method and post-training with execution feedback. It asks about a potential hybrid approach that the paper does not explore but that is a natural extension given the user's focus. It requires reasoning about the paper's architecture (hypernetwork + frozen LM) and how one might incorporate reinforcement learning or execution signals, making it substantive and forward-looking.
reason.zh: 该问题融合了两个核心兴趣：超网络方法和带执行反馈的后训练。它询问论文未探索但鉴于用户关注点自然延伸的潜在混合方法。需要推理论文的架构（超网络+冻结LM）以及如何纳入强化学习或执行信号，使其具有实质性和前瞻性。

question.en: How does Code2LoRA's zero inference-time token overhead (by injecting repository knowledge via adapters rather than input prompts) impact its applicability to resource-constrained, human-in-the-loop coding assistants where low latency is critical, and does the benchmark measure any proxy for such real-time interaction (e.g., inference speed or memory usage)?
question.zh: Code2LoRA的零推理时token开销（通过适配器而非输入提示注入仓库知识）如何影响其在资源受限、人机交互的编码助手（低延迟至关重要）中的适用性？基准是否测量了此类实时交互的代理指标（例如推理速度或内存使用）？

reason.en: This question targets the user's interest in human-in-the-loop usage and practical deployability. It focuses on a key claimed advantage of Code2LoRA (zero token overhead) and asks whether the evaluation considers latency/throughput, which is crucial for interactive assistants. It also probes whether the benchmark includes any real-world usability metrics beyond accuracy.
reason.zh: 该问题针对用户对人机交互使用和实际可部署性的兴趣。它聚焦于Code2LoRA的一个关键声称优势（零token开销），并询问评估是否考虑了延迟/吞吐量，这对交互式助手至关重要。它还探究基准是否包含除准确率之外的真实世界可用性指标。

question.en: How does Code2LoRA's hypernetwork-generated LoRA adapters compare to post-training techniques (e.g., RLHF or execution feedback) in terms of adapting to repository-level conventions without per-repository fine-tuning, and what trade-offs exist between these two paradigms for improving code correctness?
question.zh: Code2LoRA的超网络生成LoRA适配器与后训练技术（如RLHF或执行反馈）相比，在无需每个仓库微调的情况下适应仓库级约定方面表现如何？这两种范式在提高代码正确性方面存在哪些权衡？

reason.en: This question directly aligns with the user's interest in post-training techniques (RLHF, execution feedback) for code generation. The paper's approach (hypernetwork-generated adapters) offers an alternative to post-training for repository-specific adaptation. Exploring the comparative advantages and trade-offs (e.g., inference cost, generalizability vs. specialization) provides deeper insight into how these paradigms could be combined or contrasted for real-world SE tasks.
reason.zh: 该问题直接契合用户对代码生成后训练技术（RLHF、执行反馈）的兴趣。本文的方法（超网络生成适配器）为仓库特定适应提供了后训练的替代方案。探索比较优势和权衡（例如推理成本、泛化性与专用性）有助于深入理解这些范式如何在真实软件工程任务中结合或对比。

answer.en: The paper does not directly compare Code2LoRA's hypernetwork-generated adapters to post-training techniques like RLHF or execution feedback, as it focuses on contrasting with per-repository fine-tuning and shared LoRA baselines. The claimed advantage of Code2LoRA is that it "effectively injects repository knowledge with zero inference-time token overhead," meaning it adds no latency to generation unlike methods that extend input with retrieved context. In terms of adapting to repository-level conventions without per-repository fine-tuning, Code2LoRA-Static "achieves 63.8% cross-repo and 66.2% in-repo exact match, matching the per-repository LoRA upper bound" on assertion-completion tasks, showing specialization can be achieved efficiently. However, the trade-offs versus RLHF or execution feedback—which typically improve general code correctness via preference learning or unit test signals—are not explored. The paper's evaluation is limited to exact-match accuracy on repository-specific tests, not on broader functional correctness or alignment; thus, any comparison on improving general code correctness is speculative.
answer.zh: 本文并未直接将Code2LoRA的超网络生成适配器与RLHF或执行反馈等后训练技术进行比较，因为它侧重于与每个仓库微调和共享LoRA基线的对比。Code2LoRA声称的优势在于它“以零推理时token开销有效注入仓库知识”，这意味着它不像那些通过检索上下文扩展输入的方法那样增加生成延迟。在无需每个仓库微调的情况下适应仓库级约定方面，Code2LoRA-Static在断言完成任务上“实现了跨仓库63.8%和仓库内66.2%的精确匹配，达到了每个仓库LoRA的上限”，表明可以高效实现专用化。然而，与RLHF或执行反馈（通常通过偏好学习或单元测试信号提高通用代码正确性）之间的权衡并未探讨。本文的评估仅限于仓库特定测试的精确匹配准确率，而非更广泛的功能正确性或对齐；因此，任何关于提高通用代码正确性的比较都是推测性的。

question.en: Does the benchmark RepoPeftBench, with its static and evolution tracks, advance evaluation methodology beyond standard functional-correctness metrics (e.g., pass@k) by measuring aspects like integration with existing codebases and handling of evolving APIs? If so, what specific insights does it provide about the practical deployability of repository-level code generation models?
question.zh: RepoPeftBench基准测试（包含静态和演化赛道）是否通过测量与现有代码库的集成以及处理演化API等方面，超越了标准功能正确性指标（如pass@k）的评估方法？如果是，它对于仓库级代码生成模型的实际可部署性提供了哪些具体见解？

reason.en: The user explicitly cares about new benchmarks and evaluation methodologies that measure real-world outcomes (compilation, execution, integration). This question probes whether RepoPeftBench achieves that goal, focusing on its design (assertion completion, commit-derived tasks) and how it captures the challenges of software evolution, which is a key gap in isolated function evaluation.
reason.zh: 用户明确关心衡量真实世界结果（编译、执行、集成）的新基准和评估方法。该问题探究RepoPeftBench是否实现了这一目标，重点关注其设计（断言完成、提交派生任务）以及它如何捕捉软件演化的挑战，这是孤立函数评估中的一个关键空白。

answer.en: Yes, RepoPeftBench advances evaluation beyond standard functional-correctness metrics like pass@k by explicitly measuring integration with existing codebases and handling of evolving APIs. The benchmark's static track uses "assertion-completion tasks" that require models to resolve imports, APIs, and project conventions—capabilities that go beyond isolated function correctness. Its evolution track consists of "commit-derived training and commit-derived test tasks" that simulate real-world software evolution, directly testing a model's ability to handle changing APIs and codebases over time. The paper states that "code language models need repository-level context to resolve imports, APIs, and project conventions," and RepoPeftBench is built to evaluate exactly that. By reporting exact match on these tasks rather than pass@k, the benchmark captures practical deployability aspects such as whether generated code compiles and integrates correctly within a repository's full context, not just whether it passes unit tests in isolation.
answer.zh: 是的，RepoPeftBench通过明确测量与现有代码库的集成以及处理演化API，超越了标准功能正确性指标（如pass@k）。基准的静态赛道使用“断言完成任务”，要求模型解析导入、API和项目约定——这些能力超越了孤立函数的正确性。其演化赛道由“提交派生的训练和提交派生的测试任务”组成，模拟真实世界的软件演化，直接测试模型处理随时间变化的API和代码库的能力。论文指出“代码语言模型需要仓库级上下文来解析导入、API和项目约定”，而RepoPeftBench正是为此而构建。通过在这些任务上报告精确匹配而非pass@k，基准捕捉了实际可部署性方面，例如生成的代码是否能在仓库完整上下文中正确编译和集成，而不仅仅是在孤立环境中通过单元测试。

question.en: How does Code2LoRA-Evo's use of a GRU hidden state updated per code diff (to handle evolving codebases) address the challenge of long-context handling in repository-level code generation, and what implications does this approach have for maintaining correctness in active development compared to retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) methods?
question.zh: Code2LoRA-Evo使用按代码差异更新的GRU隐藏状态（以处理演化的代码库）如何解决仓库级代码生成中的长上下文处理挑战？与检索增强生成（RAG）方法相比，这种方法对在活跃开发中保持正确性有何影响？

reason.en: The user is interested in long-context handling mechanisms. This question specifically targets Code2LoRA-Evo's incremental, diff-based update mechanism as a strategy to manage long-lived repository context without token overhead. Comparing it to RAG (a common long-context solution) explores the trade-offs between context management approaches, which is central to the user's research agenda.
reason.zh: 用户对长上下文处理机制感兴趣。该问题专门针对Code2LoRA-Evo的增量、基于差异的更新机制，作为管理长期仓库上下文且无token开销的策略。将其与RAG（一种常见的长期上下文解决方案）进行比较，探讨了上下文管理方法之间的权衡，这属于用户研究议程的核心。

answer.en: The abstract describes Code2LoRA-Evo as an approach that "maintains an adapter backed by a GRU hidden state updated per code diff." This explicitly addresses the long-context challenge of repository-level code generation not by extending the input window, but by compressing the entire codebase's evolving history into a compact, updated latent representation. The paper notes that the static alternative "inject[s] this knowledge as long inputs" via methods like RAG, while Code2LoRA achieves "zero inference-time token overhead." By encoding diffs incrementally into a GRU hidden state, the approach avoids the token budget and retrieval latency issues inherent to RAG-based methods that must fetch and concatenate relevant context at generation time. For correctness during active development, the diff-by-diff update allows the adapter to reflect the current state of the repository without re-encoding the entire codebase. However, the provided abstract does not include direct comparisons or quantitative results on correctness versus RAG; it only reports that "Code2LoRA-Evo achieves 60.3% cross-repo exact match (+5.2 pp over a single shared LoRA)," but not against a RAG baseline. Therefore, the implications for correctness relative to RAG are inferable but not directly stated.
answer.zh: 摘要将Code2LoRA-Evo描述为一种“维护由按代码差异更新的GRU隐藏状态支持的适配器”的方法。这明确解决了仓库级代码生成的长上下文挑战，不是通过扩展输入窗口，而是将整个代码库的演化历史压缩为紧凑、更新的潜在表示。论文指出静态替代方案通过RAG等方法“将这些知识作为长输入注入”，而Code2LoRA实现了“零推理时token开销”。通过将差异增量编码到GRU隐藏状态中，该方法避免了基于RAG的方法在生成时获取和拼接相关上下文所固有的token预算和检索延迟问题。对于活跃开发中的正确性，逐差异更新允许适配器反映仓库的当前状态，而无需重新编码整个代码库。然而，提供的摘要并未包含与RAG的直接比较或正确性定量结果；它仅报告“Code2LoRA-Evo实现了跨仓库精确匹配60.3%（比单个共享LoRA高5.2个百分点）”，但未与RAG基线对比。因此，相对于RAG的正确性含义是可推断的，但未直接说明。

question.en: Could the hypernetwork-generated adapter approach in Code2LoRA be combined with post-training techniques (e.g., fine-tuning the hypernetwork with execution feedback) to improve correctness on repository-level tasks, and what experimental design would be needed to test this synergy?
question.zh: Code2LoRA中的超网络生成适配器方法能否与后训练技术（例如使用执行反馈微调超网络）相结合，以提高仓库级任务的正确性？需要什么样的实验设计来测试这种协同作用？

question.zh: Code2LoRA的零推理时token开销（通过适配器而非输入提示注入仓库知识）如何影响其在资源受限、人机交互的编码助手（低延迟至关重要）中的适用性？基准是否测量了此类实时交互的代理指标（例如推理速度或内存使用）？

reason.en: This question targets the user's interest in human-in-the-loop usage and practical deployability. It focuses on a key claimed advantage of Code2LoRA (zero token overhead) and asks whether the evaluation considers latency/throughput, which is crucial for interactive assistants. It also probes whether the benchmark includes any real-world usability metrics beyond accuracy.
reason.zh: 该问题针对用户对人机交互使用和实际可部署性的兴趣。它聚焦于Code2LoRA的一个关键声称优势（零token开销），并询问评估是否考虑了延迟/吞吐量，这对交互式助手至关重要。它还探究基准是否包含除准确率之外的真实世界可用性指标。

answer.en: Code2LoRA's zero inference-time token overhead is theoretically beneficial for resource-constrained, human-in-the-loop coding assistants because it avoids the latency penalty of long input prompts. The paper states that Code2LoRA 'injects repository knowledge with zero inference-time token overhead,' which would reduce per-request processing time compared to RAG or prompt-based methods. However, the benchmark RepoPeftBench does not measure any proxy for real-time interaction such as inference speed, memory usage, or throughput. The evaluation is limited to exact match accuracy on assertion-completion tasks (e.g., '63.8% cross-repo and 66.2% in-repo exact match' on the static track). No latency or resource consumption metrics are reported, so the practical impact on low-latency interactive assistants remains unvalidated by the paper's experiments.
answer.zh: Code2LoRA的零推理时token开销理论上对资源受限、人机交互的编码助手有益，因为它避免了长输入提示的延迟惩罚。论文指出Code2LoRA“以零推理时token开销注入仓库知识”，这将减少每次请求的处理时间，相比RAG或基于提示的方法。然而，基准RepoPeftBench并未测量实时交互的任何代理指标，如推理速度、内存使用或吞吐量。评估仅限于断言完成任务的精确匹配准确率（例如静态赛道“跨仓库63.8%和仓库内66.2%的精确匹配”）。未报告延迟或资源消耗指标，因此论文实验未验证对低延迟交互助手的实际影响。
